title: AE2 Overclocked
description: Provides four upgrade cards to improve the efficiency of single-block processing machines.
body:
## AE2 Overclocked

AE2 Overclocked is a high-performance addon for late-game Applied Energistics 2 automation.  
It introduces a full upgrade card system that significantly boosts throughput, internal capacity, power handling, and I/O transfer speed for supported machines and network devices, while keeping execution safe through material, energy, and output validation.

## Features

### Parallel Card System

Scale machine throughput with five Parallel Card tiers:

- Parallel Card (×2) — 2x parallel processing
- Parallel Card (×8) — 8x parallel processing
- Parallel Card (×64) — 64x parallel processing
- Parallel Card (×1024) — 1024x parallel processing
- Parallel Card (Max) — Configurable maximum multiplier (default: 2,147,483,647x)

Parallel Cards are mutually exclusive: only one tier can be installed per machine.

### Capacity Card

Increases internal item slot stack limits for supported machines.

### Super Energy Card

Expands machine internal energy buffer for high-demand workloads (default: 2,000,000,000 FE).

### Overclock Card

Compresses recipe processing to 1 tick when material, energy, and output checks pass.  
On supported paths, outputs can be transferred directly to the ME Network.

### Super Speed Card

Boosts throughput for I/O Ports and import/export buses.  
When installed, it increases transfer speed for AE2 and ExtendedAE I/O devices,

## Supported Machines and Devices

- AE2 Inscriber
- AE2 I/O Port
- AE2 Import Bus
- AE2 Export Bus
- ExtendedAE Extended Inscriber
- ExtendedAE Circuit Cutter
- ExtendedAE Extended I/O Port
- ExtendedAE Extended Import Bus
- ExtendedAE Extended Export Bus
- AdvancedAE Reaction Chamber
- AE2 Crystal Science Circuit Etcher
- AE2 Crystal Science Crystal Pulverizer
- AE2 Crystal Science Crystal Aggregator
- AE2 Crystal Science Entropy Variation Reaction Chamber
